texto: Happiness is not a thing - it is a feeling
autor: a way of joyful living and being. It comes from inner fulfilment and appreciating the world you live in.
explicacao: Citação de a way of joyful living and being. It comes from inner fulfilment and appreciating the world you live in. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Happiness is not a thing - it is a feeling” articula reflexao, rasheed-ogunlaru, happiness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
